mapper.sql: p.id, p.category_id, c.name AS category_name, p.name, p.price, p.stock, p.specification, p.image_url, p.description, p.origin, p.shelf_life, p.storage_method, p.delivery_info, p.sales, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = p.category_id
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.status = 1 AND c.status = 1
ORDER BY p.id DESC
SELECT FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE p.status = 1 AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY p.sales DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (category_id, name, price, stock, specification, image_url, description, origin, shelf_life, storage_method, delivery_info, sales, status) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{specification}, #{imageUrl}, #{description}, #{origin}, #{shelfLife}, #{storageMethod}, #{deliveryInfo}, #{sales}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, specification = #{specification}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, description = #{description}, origin = #{origin}, shelf_life = #{shelfLife}, storage_method = #{storageMethod}, delivery_info = #{deliveryInfo}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
